x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Hazard records represent identified workplace risks that Now Assist can analyze for patterns and recommend controls. Adequate hazard data volume enables AI to surface insights across locations, departments, and hazard categories.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure workplace hazards are logged in the HS module.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_5e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c39
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Hazard records represent identified workplace risks that Now Assist can analyze for patterns and recommend controls. Adequate hazard data volume enables AI to surface insights across locations, departments, and hazard categories.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>HS Hazard Volume</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_hs_rm_hazard");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=50)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" hazards",finding:c+" hazard records found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" hazards",finding:c+" hazard records found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 hazards",finding:"No hazard records found."};
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>HS</module>
<number>CHK0006164</number>
<order/>
<remediation_guidance>Ensure workplace hazards are logged in the HS module.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>5e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c39</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
